nav.tagline: The bridge between Japan & Dubai wealth creation

hero.subtitle: 日本とドバイを結ぶ — Real Estate × Wealth Creation
hero.description: The rare partner fluent in both markets — guiding your wealth to its next horizon.
hero.passageSub: 二つの世界を、ひとつの物語に。

about.label: UAE & Dubai Business Setup Consulting
about.title: Your first move into Dubai.
about.p1: The UAE, centered on Dubai, is one of the world's premier business hubs — zero corporate tax (with qualifying exemptions), zero personal income tax, 100% foreign ownership and full profit repatriation. JWD handles every procedure your Dubai entry requires, end to end: company formation, licensing, visas, Emirates ID, bank accounts, tax registration and statutory audit.
about.p2: Combining deep networks with UAE authorities and major free zones with Japanese-language expertise, we complete complex procedures quickly and reliably — minimizing your market-entry cost and time risk so you can focus on what matters: growth.

whyDubai.label: UAE Strategic Business Environment
whyDubai.title: Why Dubai, why now
whyDubai.card1Text: Over 50 free zones guarantee 100% foreign ownership and full profit repatriation, making the UAE the strategic gateway to the Middle East, Africa and South Asia — a rare jurisdiction with no personal income or capital gains tax, where wealth preservation and expansion coexist.
whyDubai.card2Text: The 9% corporate tax introduced in 2023 signals international compliance — yet free-zone incentives and double-tax treaties with 143+ countries still deliver exceptional efficiency. Precise structuring and early registration decide long-term advantage.
whyDubai.card3Text: From formation and licensing to visas, Emirates ID, banking, tax registration and audit — one team executes all eight essential procedures as a single coherent scheme, eliminating the friction of fragmented vendors.

services.label: Consulting Services
services.title: Eight essential procedures. One team.
services.intro: JWD is the one-stop, Japanese-language advisory that executes every procedure a Dubai market entry requires — as one coordinated team.

hoe.label: Flagship Project · The World Islands
hoe.title: The Heart of Europe
hoe.desc: Four kilometres off the Dubai coast lies The World — an archipelago of man-made islands. At its center, a Europe-themed resort development is rising: The Heart of Europe. This is JWD's flagship project, one Tomo invests in personally. Hotels, villas, residences — assets that float on the sea, like nothing else on earth.

japanProps.label: Japan Properties
japanProps.title: Why Japan, why now
japanProps.item1Text: A historically weak yen makes prime Japanese assets unusually accessible to overseas investors.
japanProps.item2Text: Property-based succession schemes optimize wealth transfer across generations.
japanProps.item3Text: Japan's akiya stock is an untapped frontier where renovation unlocks outsized yields.
japanProps.item4Text: Recovering tourism is creating fresh openings in regional cities and resort areas.
